headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 5, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Detroit Tigers, securing a 10-3 victory. Ceddanne Rafaela led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 4 runs. In other action, the Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Casey Legumina earning the win and Cole Sulser notching the save. Bryce Harper led the Philadelphia Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, while Cristopher Sánchez pitched 8 strong innings, striking out 10 and allowing no earned runs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries. The Chicago Cubs placed LHP Matthew Boyd on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 4, 2026, due to a left meniscus injury. The Cincinnati Reds placed RHP Emilio Pagán on the 15-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain and transferred LHP Brandon Williamson from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left shoulder fatigue. The Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 4, 2026, due to a left oblique strain. The Houston Astros placed SS Carlos Correa on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 5, 2026, due to a left ankle tendon injury.

Several teams made roster moves. The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Trevor Richards to the Chicago White Sox for cash. The Atlanta Braves traded C Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash. The Washington Nationals traded 3B Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Tigers 10-3**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Detroit Tigers, securing a 10-3 victory. Ceddanne Rafaela led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Casey Legumina earning the win and Cole Sulser notching the save. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays with 2 hits, including a home run, while Hunter Bigge impressed in relief with 2 strikeouts and no earned runs in 1 inning.

top_news.title: **Phillies Rout Athletics 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Athletics in a one-sided matchup, securing a 9-1 victory. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, while Cristopher Sánchez pitched 8 strong innings, striking out 10 and allowing no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Marlins in Thrilling 9-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought win against the Miami Marlins, outscoring them 9-7. Liam Hicks led the Orioles' offense with a standout performance, going 4 for 5 with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Fall to Rays in Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays suffered a 0-3 loss to the Tampa Bay Rays, marking their defeat in the matchup. Myles Straw was one of the impact hitters for the Blue Jays.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Cardinals 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-2 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with multiple players contributing to the win. Sal Frelick, Jackson Chourio, Jake Bauers, and Andrew Vaughn were among the impact hitters for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Matthew Boyd Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Matthew Boyd has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left meniscus injury, effective retroactive to May 4, 2026.

top_news.title: **Rays Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays have traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash.
